node_5.subject: Mei Lin
node_5.description: This is Mei Lin's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, have breakfast from 8:00 am to 8:30 am, leave for Oak Hill College at 9:15 am to arrive by 10:00 am, teach her philosophy class from 10:00 am to 12:00 pm, have lunch with colleagues from 12:00 pm to 1:00 pm, teach another class from 1:00 pm to 2:00 pm, return home by 2:45 pm, help Eddy with his schoolwork from 3:00 pm to 4:30 pm.
